misc: Struggles with his gender identity, occasionally participating in events under his female alter-ego, "Eva".
biography: From the challenging greens of Kurk Golf, Marcus is poised to make his remarkable thirteenth appearance at the esteemed Hector Trophée. His enduring presence across twelve previous editions has solidified his standing as an intrinsic part of the tournament's narrative, a testament to a profound dedication to this unique pairs competition.

Despite a decade of navigating the intricate demands of the Hector Trophée, the ultimate accolades have, to date, remained just beyond Marcus's grasp. Neither the illustrious Hector Trophée for the victorious pair nor the prestigious individual Victor Trophy has been secured, yet his resolve to contend has never diminished, highlighting a sustained quest for championship glory.

Marcus's journey through the Hector Trophée is further distinguished by a deeply personal aspect of his identity. He openly navigates his gender identity, occasionally participating in other events under his female alter-ego, Eva. This profound introspection and courage in embracing his authentic self offer a unique lens through which to view his relentless pursuit on the golf course, reflecting a deep engagement with self-discovery that transcends the game itself.

As Marcus prepares for the Hector Trophée 2026, he remains an active and captivating participant, embodying an unyielding spirit both on and off the course. His multifaceted life and steadfast ambition ensure he will be a keenly observed figure, perpetually striving to etch his name onto the tournament's list of champions.
